parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Shared memory receiver behaviour

participant "Shared memory receiver" as SMR
entity "Semaphore coord" as SC

box "Coordination struct" #LightGray
entity "Reader count var" as RCV
entity "locks_active" as LA
entity "locks_leaving" as LL
entity "Semaphore copy" as SCopy
end box

entity "Copy buff" as CB

group create
    activate SMR
    alt "Coordination semaphore doesn't exist"
        SMR -> SC : Create semaphore
    end
    SMR -> SC : wait
    SC <-->] : Writer sets up sharedmemory
    SC <-] : Writer is ready
    SC -> SMR : ok
    SMR -> RCV : reincrease
    note right: this way all readers access the memory,\nthey will fail on the copy sem
    SMR -> SMR : MMap coordination struct
    SMR -> SCopy : Trylock copy semaphore
    alt fail
        SCopy --> SMR : Can't lock
        SMR -->] : Fail
    else success
        SCopy --> SMR : Success
        SMR -> SMR : MMap copy buffer
        SMR -> SMR : read_flag to true
        SMR -> LL : Lock leaving[1]
        activate LL
        LL --> SMR
        deactivate LL
        SMR -> RCV : Signal reader ready
    end
    SMR -> SMR : Close coordination semaphore file
    SMR -->] : Success
    deactivate SMR
end

group ready
    -> SMR : ready?
    activate SMR
    alt finished flag set
        SMR -->] : False
    else has read current chunk
        SMR -> LA : lock next chunk (reading)
        activate LA
        note right: Blocks until next\nchunk is written
        LA --> SMR
        deactivate LA
        SMR -> LL : Release previous leaving
        SMR -> SMR : Change active
        SMR -> SMR : reset read flag
        SMR -> CB : get chunk size
        activate CB
        CB --> SMR : c_size
        deactivate CB
        SMR -->] : c_size > 0
    else Yet to read current and no finished flag
        SMR -->] : True
    end
    alt finished
        note left: This is done before\nactually returning
        SMR -> SMR : Set finished flag
        SMR -> LA : Release lock
    end
    deactivate SMR
end

group buff size
    activate SMR
    SMR -> SMR : get buff_size from coord
    <-- SMR : buff_size
    deactivate SMR
end

group receive
    activate SMR
    note right: This is called after ready so I am already on the correct\nchunk and it has data to read
    alt read_flag_set or finished flag set
        SMR -->] : Fail
    end
    SMR -> CB : Read data in current chunk
    activate CB
    CB --> SMR : vector
    deactivate CB
    SMR -> SMR : set read flag
    SMR -> LL : lock leaving
    activate LL
    LL --> SMR
    deactivate LL
    SMR -> LA : release active
    <-- SMR : vector
    deactivate SMR
end

group destructor
    -> SMR : Destroy
    activate SMR
    alt not finished
        alt read_flag set
            SMR -> LL : unlock
        else read_flag false
            SMR -> LA : unlock
        end
    end
    SMR -> RCV : Notify left
    SMR -> SMR : Unmap memory
    SMR -> SMR : Close files
    deactivate SMR
end

@enduml
```
